prompt_text:
### Demographics: 61-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 98.6 kg; Height 169.8 cm; BMI 34.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 120/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.5%; 9 months ago 7.9%; 6 months ago 7.4%; 3 months ago 6.9%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 214mg/dL; 9 months ago 196mg/dL; 6 months ago 162mg/dL; 3 months ago 136mg/dL; current 110mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 98.7kg; 9 months ago 94.7kg; 6 months ago 98.3kg; 3 months ago 94.3kg; current 98.6kg), Height (12 months ago 169.8cm; 9 months ago 169.8cm; 6 months ago 169.8cm; 3 months ago 169.8cm; current 169.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 34.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 123mmHg; 9 months ago 124mmHg; 6 months ago 121mmHg; 3 months ago 122mmHg; current 120mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 70mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 60U/L; 9 months ago 67U/L; 6 months ago 68U/L; 3 months ago 68U/L; current 66U/L), AST (12 months ago 81U/L; 9 months ago 80U/L; 6 months ago 81U/L; 3 months ago 89U/L; current 86U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.4mg/dL; current 1.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; current 24mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 242mg/g; 9 months ago 330mg/g; 6 months ago 325mg/g; 3 months ago 245mg/g; current 277mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 85mg/dL; 6 months ago 83mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 81mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 43mg/dL; 9 months ago 43mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 42mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 119mg/dL; 9 months ago 120mg/dL; 6 months ago 119mg/dL; 3 months ago 119mg/dL; current 113mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.3g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 9.7g/dL; current 9.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
